{{Infobox icon
| name = Shield Icon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

''See also: [[Shield Icon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Shield [[Icon]] is a specialized connection available to [[Heralds]] that provides defensive capabilities. Visually represented by symbols resembling castle walls or shining blue barriers, the [[Icon]] projects authority and can manifest as absolute defenses. Its protective functions are versatile; it can act as a barrier to isolate areas, block massive physical forces like earthquakes or spatial destruction, and even serve to contain forces within a specific area rather than just keeping them out. While the [[Icon]] can be layered onto a [[Herald]]'s body for added durability, its effectiveness is tied to the user's experience and abilities. For newly awakened users, the [[Icon]] may be limited in its reach or spatial authority. The connection is often experienced as a constant, melodic presence or song within the user's mind that can fluctuate in intensity based on the need for protection.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Shield [[Icon]] first emitted a discordant note before providing protection to [[Yerin]]. As [[Ziel]] listened to its song, he clung to the icon, which eventually sang within his heart and showed approval for a death that would safeguard others. Although it possesses no inherent connection to spatial authority, the icon's hardiness covered [[Mercy]] and reinforced barriers for [[Ziel]]. Ultimately, the Shield [[Icon]] prevented [[Ziel]] from being destroyed during his battle with his [[Remnant]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] produced a discordant note.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] provides protection to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] listened to the song of the [[Shield Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] has no inherent connection to spatial authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] clung to the [[Shield Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] sang in [[Ziel]]'s heart.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] approved of the death that would protect people.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The hardiness of the [[Shield Icon]] covers [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] prevented [[Ziel]] from being destroyed during the fight with his [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Shield Icon]] reinforced barriers for [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Shield [[Icon]] emits a continuous singing sound that remains a constant presence within [[Ziel]]'s mind. This song gradually increases in volume, becoming an annoyance to [[Ziel]] as it grows louder. Beyond its auditory effect, the icon's protective properties can be utilized to keep various forces locked in place.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Shield Icon]] sang to [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Shield Icon]] produces a singing sound that [[Ziel]] finds annoying.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The song of the [[Shield Icon]] is a constant presence in [[Ziel]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Shield Icon]] has a song that grows in volume.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The protection of the [[Shield Icon]] can be used to keep forces locked in.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
